category_sources: Official PowerDNS docs identify this as PowerDNS Recursor: https://docs.powerdns.com/recursor/.
display_name_sources: Official documentation title is PowerDNS Recursor: https://docs.powerdns.com/recursor/.
source_facts.name is pdnsrec, the package name.
docs_sources: Official dedicated documentation for PowerDNS Recursor is https://docs.powerdns.com/recursor/.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official PowerDNS downloads page says source code is hosted on GitHub, and the official repository is https://github.com/PowerDNS/pdns.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a recursing DNS server; official docs are for PowerDNS Recursor: https://docs.powerdns.com/recursor/.
